title: ImUi TextField Draft Controller API Proof v1
problem: The previous TextField draft-buffer audit kept preserved draft internals private until a real proof surface needed external commit/discard. This lane proves the smallest editor-owned contract: an opaque TextField draft controller for explicit app-authored Commit draft / Discard draft affordances without exposing the internal draft model or widening generic IMUI/runtime APIs.

repro.summary: Run the TextField API smoke, editor-notes rail proof, source-policy gate, and launched editor-notes draft-controller diagnostics proof.
commands: cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag script validate tools/diag-scripts/ui-editor/editor-notes-demo/editor-notes-demo-draft-controller-proof.json

cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag run tools/diag-scripts/ui-editor/editor-notes-demo/editor-notes-demo-draft-controller-proof.json --dir target/fret-diag/editor-notes-draft-controller-proof --session-auto --timeout-ms 600000 --pack --ai-packet --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin editor_notes_demo
cargo nextest run -p fret-examples --test editor_notes_editor_rail_surface --test editor_notes_device_shell_surface --no-fail-fast

gates.name: editor-notes-draft-controller-script-schema
gates.command: cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag script validate tools/diag-scripts/ui-editor/editor-notes-demo/editor-notes-demo-draft-controller-proof.json

gates.name: editor-notes-draft-controller-launched-diag
gates.command: cargo run -p fretboard-dev -- diag run tools/diag-scripts/ui-editor/editor-notes-demo/editor-notes-demo-draft-controller-proof.json --dir target/fret-diag/editor-notes-draft-controller-proof --session-auto --timeout-ms 600000 --pack --ai-packet --launch -- cargo run -p fret-demo --bin editor_notes_demo

gates.name: editor-notes-rail-surface
gates.command: cargo nextest run -p fret-examples --test editor_notes_editor_rail_surface --test editor_notes_device_shell_surface --no-fail-fast

continue_policy.notes: This lane is closed after the opaque draft-controller API and launched editor-notes diagnostics proof. Start a narrower follow-on for persistence, workspace dirty-close, command-bus integration, clipboard, document-state integration, or public generic IMUI helper widening.
